project_type: Kiro skill - markdown documentation files for CloudWatch Logs query generation
verification_instructions: Manually review the modified markdown files for correctness, formatting consistency, and completeness
setup_instructions: No setup required - edit markdown files directly
environment_constraints: No network access needed. Pure markdown editing task.
contribution_requirements: Follow existing markdown formatting conventions used in the skill and reference files
key_patterns: The skill file uses ## for major sections, ### for subsections. Code examples use triple backtick fenced blocks with language hints. Tables use pipe-delimited markdown. The reference file uses --- horizontal rules between major language sections. Tips/gotchas use bullet lists with bold lead text.
directory_structure: Flat repository with 4 main files: skill file, reference file, English readme, Japanese readme
